title: Agent loop 何时结束：ResultMessage.subtype 决定终止状态
title_en: When the Agent Loop Ends: ResultMessage.subtype Determines Termination State

body.concept: Agent loop 结束时，SDK 产出 ResultMessage，其 `subtype` 字段标明终止原因。共 5 种 subtype：(1) `success`——Claude 的响应不含工具调用，任务正常完成，`result` 字段包含最终文本；(2) `error_max_turns`——触达 maxTurns 上限；(3) `error_max_budget_usd`——累计费用超出 maxBudgetUsd 限制；(4) `error_during_execution`——执行过程中出错（如 API 故障或请求被取消）；(5) `error_max_structured_output_retries`——结构化输出校验在重试上限后仍然失败。只有 `success` 时 `result` 字段可用，其余 subtype 均不含最终文本。注意：hook 的 PreToolUse 回调可以拒绝某次工具调用（Claude 会收到拒绝消息并尝试其他方式），但这不构成独立的终止 subtype。
body.analogy: 想象一个厨师在厨房做菜。success = 菜做好了端上桌；error_max_turns = 只允许翻炒 N 次，次数用完必须停；error_max_budget_usd = 食材预算用完；error_during_execution = 灶台突然坏了；error_max_structured_output_retries = 反复摆盘都不达标。经理走进来拦下某个动作（hook rejection）不会直接关厨房，厨师会换个做法继续。
body.visual: 循环运行 → Claude 响应 → [无工具调用？] → 是 → ResultMessage(success)。否 → [达到 maxTurns？] → 是 → ResultMessage(error_max_turns)。否 → [超出 maxBudgetUsd？] → 是 → ResultMessage(error_max_budget_usd)。否 → [执行出错？] → 是 → ResultMessage(error_during_execution)。否 → 继续下一个 turn。

body_en.concept: When the agent loop ends, the SDK yields a ResultMessage whose `subtype` field indicates why. There are 5 subtypes: (1) `success` — Claude's response has no tool calls, task completed normally, `result` field contains final text; (2) `error_max_turns` — hit the maxTurns limit; (3) `error_max_budget_usd` — cumulative cost exceeded maxBudgetUsd; (4) `error_during_execution` — an error interrupted the loop (e.g., API failure or cancelled request); (5) `error_max_structured_output_retries` — structured output validation failed after the configured retry limit. Only `success` carries the `result` field; all other subtypes do not contain final text. Note: a PreToolUse hook can reject a specific tool call (Claude receives the rejection and tries a different approach), but this is not a separate termination subtype.
body_en.analogy: Imagine a chef cooking in a kitchen. success = dish is done, serve it. error_max_turns = only allowed N stir-fry rounds, must stop when used up. error_max_budget_usd = ingredient budget ran out. error_during_execution = stove suddenly broke. error_max_structured_output_retries = repeated plating attempts all failed quality check. A manager blocking one specific action (hook rejection) doesn't shut down the kitchen — the chef switches to a different approach.
body_en.visual: Loop running → Claude responds → [No tool calls?] → Yes → ResultMessage(success). No → [Hit maxTurns?] → Yes → ResultMessage(error_max_turns). No → [Exceeded maxBudgetUsd?] → Yes → ResultMessage(error_max_budget_usd). No → [Execution error?] → Yes → ResultMessage(error_during_execution). No → Continue to next turn.
